registration.verify_body:
Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.

If you did not create an account, please ignore this email.
registration.success_message: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.
registration.error_generic: Registration could not be completed. Please try again or contact support.

jobs.posting_approved: Your job posting has been approved!
jobs.posting_not_approved: Your job posting was not approved

guardian.consent_preview: A minor in your care needs your consent to participate in volunteering
guardian.consent_body: A minor in your care has requested your consent to participate in volunteering activities on Project NEXUS.
guardian.consent_highlight: Your consent is required before they can participate. Please review and respond using the button below.
guardian.consent_ignore: If you did not expect this request, you can safely ignore this email. No action will be taken without your explicit consent.
guardian.consent_granted_minor_bell: Your guardian has approved consent for your volunteering activities.
guardian.consent_withdrawn_minor_bell: Guardian consent has been withdrawn from your volunteering activities.
guardian.consent_withdrawn_admin_bell: Guardian consent has been withdrawn by an administrator.

safeguarding.training_not_approved: Your {{training_name}} record was not approved. Please contact support for details.
safeguarding.dlp_assigned_bell: You have been assigned as the Designated Liaison Person for safeguarding incident #{{incident_id}}
safeguarding.dlp_assigned_preview: [{{severity}}] You've been assigned as DLP for incident #{{incident_id}}
safeguarding.dlp_assigned_highlight: You have been assigned as the Designated Liaison Person (DLP) for a safeguarding incident.
safeguarding.dlp_assigned_body: As DLP, you are responsible for coordinating the safeguarding response for this incident. Please review this immediately.
safeguarding.dlp_assigned_audit_note: All access to safeguarding data is audit-logged.
safeguarding.incident_reported_highlight: A {{severity}} safeguarding incident has been reported.
safeguarding.incident_reported_review: Please review this in the admin panel and take appropriate action.
safeguarding.incident_reported_auto_note: This is an automated notification from the platform safeguarding system.
safeguarding.incident_status_changed: Your safeguarding incident #{{incident_id}} has been marked as {{status}}
safeguarding.incident_updated_review: Please review this in the admin panel.
safeguarding.onboarding_flag_bell: Safeguarding flag: {{name}} indicated support needs during onboarding — {{options}}
safeguarding.onboarding_flag_body: A member has indicated safeguarding support needs during onboarding.
safeguarding.onboarding_flag_review: Please review this in the admin panel and take appropriate action. This may include assigning a guardian, adjusting messaging permissions, or contacting the member directly.
safeguarding.onboarding_flag_audit_note: All access to safeguarding data is audit-logged.
safeguarding.broker_message_flagged_subject: [NEXUS] Broker review: message from monitored member {{sender}}
safeguarding.broker_message_flagged_preview: A message from a monitored member requires your review
safeguarding.broker_message_flagged_body: A message from a monitored member ({{sender}}) has been copied to the broker review queue.
safeguarding.broker_message_high_risk_body: A message related to a high-risk listing from {{sender}} has been copied to the broker review queue.
safeguarding.broker_message_audit_note: All broker review actions are audit-logged.
safeguarding.training_verified_body: Your {{training}} training record has been reviewed and verified.
safeguarding.training_rejected_preview: Your {{training}} record could not be approved
safeguarding.training_rejected_body: Your {{training}} training record could not be approved at this time.
safeguarding.training_rejected_next_steps: Please review the reason below and contact the coordinator if you have questions.
safeguarding.guardian_assigned_subject: [NEXUS] You've been assigned as a safeguarding guardian
safeguarding.guardian_assigned_preview: You have been assigned as a safeguarding guardian for {{name}}
safeguarding.guardian_assigned_body: You have been assigned as a safeguarding guardian for {{name}} on {{community}}. You may be contacted by coordinators regarding this role.
safeguarding.guardian_assigned_audit_note: All safeguarding data access is audit-logged.
safeguarding.ward_assigned_subject: [NEXUS] A safeguarding coordinator has been assigned to your account
safeguarding.ward_assigned_preview: {{guardian}} has been assigned to support you on {{community}}
safeguarding.ward_assigned_body: {{guardian}} has been assigned as your safeguarding coordinator on {{community}}. They are here to support you.
safeguarding.assignment_revoked_guardian_bell: Your safeguarding assignment for {{name}} has been ended
safeguarding.assignment_revoked_guardian_body: Your safeguarding guardian assignment for {{name}} on {{community}} has been ended by an administrator.
safeguarding.assignment_revoked_ward_bell: Your safeguarding support assignment has been ended
safeguarding.assignment_revoked_ward_body: Your safeguarding support assignment on {{community}} has been ended. Please contact your coordinator if you have questions.

social.connection_declined: Your connection request to {{name}} was not accepted

marketplace.listing_pending_notice: Your listing has been submitted for review and will be published once approved.

admin_notify.new_user_preview: A new member has just registered on {{community}}
admin_notify.new_user_body: A new member has just registered on {{community}}.
admin_notify.new_listing_preview: A new listing has been posted on {{community}}
admin_notify.new_listing_body: A new listing has been posted on {{community}}.
admin_notify.new_group_preview: A new group has been created on {{community}}
admin_notify.new_group_body: A new group has been created on {{community}}.
admin_notify.new_event_preview: A new event has been posted on {{community}}
admin_notify.new_event_body: A new community event has been posted on {{community}}.
admin_notify.new_vol_opp_preview: A new volunteer opportunity has been posted on {{community}}
admin_notify.new_vol_opp_body: A new volunteer opportunity has been posted on {{community}}.

goals.reminder_preview: Time to check in on your goal: {{title}}
goals.reminder_body: This is a reminder to check in on your goal and update your progress.

balance_alert.title: Organisation Wallet Alert
balance_alert.preview: Your organisation wallet balance needs attention
balance_alert.low_body: Your organisation {{org}} has a low wallet balance of {{balance}} credits.
balance_alert.critical_body: Your organisation {{org}} has a critically low wallet balance of {{balance}} credits.
balance_alert.action: Please top up the wallet to ensure continued payment to volunteers.

events.created_body: Your event :title has been published and is now visible to your community.

vol_org_wallet.payment_body: You have received {{amount}} time credits from {{org}}.
vol_org_wallet.deposit_preview: Your deposit of {{amount}} credits has been processed
vol_org_wallet.deposit_body: Your deposit of {{amount}} time credits to {{org}} has been processed successfully.

inactive_member.subject: We miss you on {{community}}!
inactive_member.title: We Miss You!
inactive_member.preview: It has been a while — come back and see what is happening
inactive_member.body: It has been a while since we have seen you. Your community is growing and there are new opportunities waiting for you.

marketplace_offer.received_preview: {{buyer}} made an offer of {{amount}} on your listing
marketplace_offer.received_body: {{buyer}} has made an offer of {{amount}} on your listing {{title}}.
marketplace_offer.accepted_preview: Your offer on {{title}} has been accepted
marketplace_offer.accepted_body: Congratulations! Your offer of {{amount}} on {{title}} has been accepted by the seller.
marketplace_offer.declined_preview: Your offer on {{title}} was not accepted
marketplace_offer.declined_body: Your offer on {{title}} was not accepted. You may browse other listings or make a revised offer.
marketplace_offer.countered_preview: The seller has made a counter-offer on your listing enquiry
marketplace_offer.countered_body: The seller has made a counter-offer of {{amount}} on {{title}}.
marketplace_offer.counter_accepted_preview: The buyer has accepted your counter-offer
marketplace_offer.counter_accepted_body: The buyer has accepted your counter-offer of {{amount}} on {{title}}.

marketplace_order.confirmed_buyer_body: Your order {{order_number}} for {{title}} has been confirmed.
marketplace_order.confirmed_seller_body: You have received a new order {{order_number}} for {{title}}.
marketplace_order.shipped_preview: Your order {{order_number}} is on its way
marketplace_order.shipped_body: Your order {{order_number}} for {{title}} has been shipped.
marketplace_order.delivered_preview: The buyer has confirmed receipt of order {{order_number}}
marketplace_order.delivered_body: The buyer has confirmed receipt of order {{order_number}}. The order will be completed in 14 days unless a dispute is raised.
marketplace_order.completed_buyer_body: Your order {{order_number}} for {{title}} has been completed. Thank you for your purchase!
marketplace_order.completed_seller_body: Order {{order_number}} for {{title}} has been completed and escrow has been released.

marketplace_report.received_subject: Report received — we will review it within 24 hours
marketplace_report.received_preview: We have received your report and will review it promptly
marketplace_report.received_body: Thank you for your report. We have received it and will review it within 24 hours as required by the Digital Services Act.
marketplace_report.received_ref: Your report reference is #{{report_id}}. Please keep this for your records.
marketplace_report.acknowledged_preview: Your report #{{report_id}} is now under active review
marketplace_report.acknowledged_body: Your report #{{report_id}} is now under active review. We will notify you of our decision.
marketplace_report.resolved_preview: We have made a decision on your report #{{report_id}}
marketplace_report.resolved_action_taken: Following our review, we took the following action: {{action}}.
marketplace_report.resolved_no_action: Following our review, we determined that no action was required at this time.
marketplace_report.resolved_appeal_rights: If you disagree with this decision, you have the right to appeal within 30 days.
marketplace_report.appeal_received_preview: We have received your appeal for report #{{report_id}}
marketplace_report.appeal_received_body: We have received your appeal for report #{{report_id}} and will review it promptly.
marketplace_report.appeal_resolved_preview: Final decision on your appeal for report #{{report_id}}
marketplace_report.appeal_resolved_body: We have reviewed your appeal for report #{{report_id}}.

group_invite.email_body: {{inviter}} has invited you to join the group {{group}}.

marketplace_rating.received_body: You received a {{rating}}-star rating on order {{order_number}}.

marketplace_dispute.opened_subject: A dispute has been opened on order {{order_number}}
marketplace_dispute.opened_body: A dispute has been opened on order {{order_number}}. Please respond promptly to help resolve this.

expense.approved_body: Your expense claim of {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{type}} has been approved.
expense.rejected_body: Your expense claim of {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{type}} was not approved.
expense.paid_body: Your expense of {{amount}} {{currency}} for {{type}} has been paid.

listing_moderation.approved_body: Your listing {{title}} has been approved and is now live on the platform.

user_ban.banned_body: Your account on {{community}} has been suspended.
user_ban.unbanned_body: Your account on {{community}} has been reinstated. You may now log in.

group_approval.approved_body: Your group {{group}} has been approved and is now active.
group_approval.rejected_subject: Your group proposal was not approved — {{group}}
group_approval.rejected_body: Your group proposal {{group}} was not approved.

stripe_subscription.activated_body: Your {{plan}} subscription has been activated successfully. Thank you for subscribing.
stripe_subscription.cancelled_body: Your subscription has been cancelled. Your platform access will continue until the end of the current billing period.
stripe_subscription.payment_failed_body: We were unable to process the payment for your subscription. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

exchange_rating.received_subject: You received a new rating on an exchange
exchange_rating.received_body: You received a {{rating}}-star rating on an exchange.

community_project.approved_subject: Your project proposal has been approved — {{title}}
community_project.approved_body: Your community project proposal {{title}} has been approved and is now active.
community_project.rejected_subject: Your project proposal was not approved — {{title}}
community_project.rejected_body: Your community project proposal {{title}} was not approved.
community_project.under_review_subject: Your project proposal is under review — {{title}}
community_project.under_review_body: Your community project proposal {{title}} is now under active review.

onboarding_completed.subject: You're all set, {{name}}! Welcome to {{community}}
onboarding_completed.title: You're All Set!
onboarding_completed.preview: Your profile is ready — start exploring {{community}}
onboarding_completed.greeting_line: Your profile is set up and you're now a full member of {{community}}.
onboarding_completed.next_steps: Here's what you can do next:
onboarding_completed.step_browse: Browse listings and offer or request help
onboarding_completed.footer_note: You can update your profile and preferences at any time from your settings.

admin_actions.welcome_created_preview: An administrator has created an account for you.
admin_actions.welcome_created_body_intro: An administrator has created an account for you on {{community}}.
admin_actions.welcome_created_body_change_pass: We recommend changing your password after your first login.
admin_actions.suspension_body: Your account on {{community}} has been suspended.
admin_actions.suspension_help: If you believe this is an error, please contact your community administrator for assistance.
admin_actions.suspension_bell: Your account has been suspended. Contact support if you believe this is an error.
admin_actions.ban_body: Your account on {{community}} has been permanently banned.
admin_actions.ban_help: If you believe this is an error, please contact your community administrator.
admin_actions.deletion_subject: Your account has been scheduled for deletion — {{community}}
admin_actions.deletion_body: Your account on {{community}} has been scheduled for deletion.
admin_actions.deletion_help: If you believe this is an error, please contact your community administrator as soon as possible.
admin_actions.reset_2fa_subject: Your two-factor authentication has been reset — {{community}}
admin_actions.reset_2fa_preview: Your 2FA has been reset by an administrator.
admin_actions.reset_2fa_body: Your two-factor authentication on {{community}} has been reset by an administrator.
admin_actions.reset_2fa_body_reenable: Your account is no longer protected by two-factor authentication. We strongly recommend re-enabling it in your security settings after logging in.
admin_actions.reset_2fa_body_contact: If you did not request this change, please contact your community administrator immediately.
admin_actions.reset_2fa_bell: Your two-factor authentication has been reset by an administrator. If you did not request this, please contact support immediately.
admin_actions.set_password_body: Your password on {{community}} has been reset by an administrator.
admin_actions.set_password_body_old_pass: Your previous password will no longer work. Please use the new password provided to you by your administrator to log in.
admin_actions.set_password_body_contact: If you did not expect this change, please contact your community administrator immediately.
admin_actions.password_reset_body: An administrator has requested a password reset for your account. Click the button below to set a new password. This link expires in 1 hour.
admin_actions.welcome_resend_body: Welcome to {{community}}! Your account is ready to use. Log in to start connecting with your community, browse available services, and offer your own skills.
admin_actions.approval_subject_credits: Welcome to {{community}} — {{credits}} time credits are waiting for you!
admin_actions.approval_subject_approved: Welcome to {{community}} — your account is approved!
admin_actions.approval_body_intro: Your account has been approved and you're now a full member of the {{community}} community.
admin_actions.approval_body_credits: To help you get started, we've added {{credits}} time credit{{plural}} to your wallet. Use them to request services from other members, or earn more by offering your own skills and time.
admin_actions.approval_body_next_steps: Here are a few things you can do right away:
admin_actions.approval_list_browse: Browse listings to see what services are available
admin_actions.approval_list_create_listing: Create your own listing to offer your skills
admin_actions.approval_list_connect: Connect with other members in your community
admin_actions.approval_list_events: Check out upcoming events and get involved
admin_actions.approval_body_closing: We're glad to have you on board. Welcome to the community!
admin_actions.approval_bell: Your account has been approved! Welcome to {{community}}.
admin_actions.approval_bell_credits: Your account has been approved! Welcome to {{community}}. You've received {{credits}} welcome time credit{{plural}} to get started.
admin_actions.reactivation_body: Your account on {{community}} has been reactivated by an administrator.
admin_actions.reactivation_body_access: You can now log in and access the platform again.

auth.verify_email_body: Please verify your email address by clicking the button below. This link will expire in 24 hours.
auth.verify_email_ignore: If you did not create an account, please ignore this email.

voice_message.email_greeting: You have received a voice message from {{sender}}
voice_message.email_body: Duration: {{duration}}. Click the button below to listen to the message.
